destination: Stripe PaymentIntents (v1 payments namespace) — SANDBOX ONLY; DRAFT pending ADR-0010

idempotency.replay_semantics: First outcome (including errors) cached and replayed for the key; replays carry Idempotent-Replayed: true; same key with different parameters returns 409 idempotency_error (no new side effect). v1 semantics per AM-5; the exact version pin is ADR-0010's human ratification.

compensation_hook: refund.create (a new intent, never rollback — ADR-007)

attribution.notes: DRAFT (2026-07-22 research pass; no live call has ever been made): Retrieve/List are documented strongly consistent; Search over metadata is explicitly NOT read-after-write safe (<1 min normally, up to 1 h during outages) — hence status_settlement_lag PT1H and search-as-secondary. evidence_quality EI until the ADR-0010 spike contract-tests every claim. Traffic must respect the sandbox 25 rps global / 20 rps search budgets and the SSA reasonable-load clause (review-queue item).
